blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,920 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
